articles.title: Pavlovic rejoices on social media: "Great victory!". And Gabbia comments: "Animal"
articles.summary: Milan won the derby against Inter 1-0 thanks to a goal by Pervis Estupinan assisted by Youssouf Fofana. Strahinja Pavlovic also wanted to celebrate the victory with the following post on Instagram: "Great victory!".

articles.title: MN: Allegri silences Real Madrid rumours by preparing tactical masterclass vs. Inter
articles.summary: AC Milan secured the only possible result in the derby against Inter and kept their Scudetto hopes alive, with Massimiliano Allegri winning another big game. As MilanNews write, Milan did the necessary work to keep alive a title race that – with a Nerazzurri victory – would have been virtually over.

Hakan Çalhanoğlu underwent an MRI this morning at the Humanitas Clinical Institute in Rozzano.

The tests highlighted a slight muscle strain in the adductors of the right thigh.
